name: LoopLens demo recalls repair experience
description: Verify the public LoopLens demo presents the repair memory workflow for the hackathon submission.

planSteps.description: The page shows the product name LoopLens and the text Repair Experience Layer.
The page shows a TestSprite failure bundle input area with login failure text.
Click the first similar verified repair result, EXP-001, if it is not already selected.
The repair context shows the decision Fix auth state rendering before editing selectors.
The PASS and LOOP.md workflow indicators are active after clicking Learn PASS.
